dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
$(APP_DISPLAY_NAME)
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
Dotsin Connector
APPL
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME)
Editor
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
$(GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID)
Used to play and manage your Apple Music library directly within the app, giving you seamless access to your songs and playlists.
Used to discover and connect to nearby devices, enabling seamless pairing and communication with compatible accessories.
Used to discover and connect to nearby devices, enabling seamless pairing and communication with compatible accessories.
Allows the app to read and write events to your calendar, helping you schedule tasks, set reminders, and sync important dates without leaving the app.
Allows the app to read and write events to your calendar, helping you schedule tasks, set reminders, and sync important dates without leaving the app.
Allows the app to add events and reminders to your calendar so you can keep your schedule up to date without leaving the app.
Required to take photos, scan QR codes, and record videos directly within the app. Your camera is only activated when you initiate these actions.
Used to help you quickly find and connect with people you know, auto-fill recipient details, and share content with your connections seamlessly.
Used to securely authenticate you with Face ID so you can unlock the app and approve sensitive actions without entering a password.
Used to read your clinical health records from Apple Health to give you a complete view of your wellness, lab results, medications, and conditions.
Used to read and sync your health and activity data with Apple Health, providing you with personalized insights and a complete wellness overview.
Used to write health and activity data to Apple Health so your records stay synchronized across the apps and devices you use.
Used to discover and communicate with compatible devices on your local Wi-Fi network for seamless pairing and data exchange.

Used to deliver location-aware features both while you are using the app and in the background, including geofenced reminders and continuous activity tracking. Your location data is never shared without your consent.
Used to deliver location-aware features in the background, such as commute tracking, geofenced reminders, and region-specific content. Your location data is never shared without your consent.
Precise location is required to deliver accurate, location-specific recommendations and mapping features.
Used to deliver location-aware features such as nearby recommendations, accurate mapping, and region-specific content. Your location data is never shared without your consent.
Used to deliver location-aware features such as nearby recommendations, accurate mapping, and region-specific content while you are using the app.
Needed to record audio messages, enable voice commands, and support video calls. The microphone is only accessed during active recording sessions.
Accesses motion sensors and activity data to track your physical activity, detect movement patterns, and provide personalized health and fitness insights.
Allows the app to save photos and videos you create in the app to your device library.
Grants access to your photos, videos, and audio files so you can upload, share, and manage your media content directly from your device library.
NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryFileTimestamp
NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategorySystemBootTime
NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryDiskSpace
NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults
Allows the app to read and write reminders so you can manage tasks, follow-ups, and time-based notes alongside your calendar events.
Allows the app to read and write reminders so you can manage tasks, follow-ups, and time-based notes alongside your calendar events.
Used to convert your spoken input into text for voice commands, dictation, and accessibility features.
Enables real-time alerts for messages, reminders, and important updates. You can customize notification preferences anytime in your device settings.
Allows the app to link your activity across other apps and websites for more relevant ads and analytics. You can opt out at any time without affecting core app functionality.
UIWindowScene
flutter
FlutterSceneDelegate
Main
LaunchScreen
Main
YES
$(MAPS_API_KEY)
